title: US2 dashboard UI: hierarchy tree, create sub-business, move, archive/restore, rename, delete
description: Surface the US2 backend (sub-business create/move/archive/restore/rename/delete) in the Angular dashboard. Build a tree view from GET /businesses (parent_id), per-node actions, confirmations. Test-first: vitest unit test for the tree builder + Playwright e2e for the hierarchy flows against the running stack.
close_reason: US2 dashboard UI built (tree/create-sub/move/archive/restore/rename/delete), unit + e2e + prod build green, verified live via Playwright MCP

title: US3 escalation security-regression suite (FR-023 at assign/edit/accept)
description: T056. internal/security_regression/escalation_test.go: escalation refused at role-assign, role-edit, and invite-accept. make sec-test gate.

title: US3 invitations & accept: create/list/revoke/resend + auth-bound single-use accept
description: T060-T062 + tests T053(invitations)/T054. invitations package: create (role <= inviter, hashed token), list, revoke, resend (throttled); accept (auth-bound + verified + email-match + re-validate authority/role/active + single-use, 410 on reuse + membership + audit). Test-first.
close_reason: Invitations create/list/revoke/resend + auth-bound single-use accept implemented. SECURITY DEFINER accept_invitation (migration 0010) handles the RLS-exempt atomic accept (invitee not yet a member). 10/10 integration subtests green (accept->scoped access, single-use 410, email-mismatch 403, unverified 403, revoke, resend rotation, escalation-at-create 409).

title: US3 change member role (members.manage, escalation guard, immediate)
description: T063. internal/tenancy/members.go: change-member-role handler+service enforcing members.manage, escalation refused (role <= actor), effective immediately. Test-first.
close_reason: T063 PATCH /businesses/{id}/members/{principalId} ChangeMemberRole: members.manage gate, escalation guard (FR-023 incl. Owner-reserved), last-Owner protection (FR-014/024), audited, no-oracle. 6 integration subtests green; lint+sec-test clean.

title: US3 roles & permissions: GET /permissions + role CRUD (presets + custom, escalation/superset guard, delete-in-use refused)
description: T057-T059 + tests T053(roles)/T055/T056. authz package: permission catalog endpoint, role service with tenant_root_id derived from path, superset/escalation check (role <= actor), delete-in-use refused (FR-025), exactly-permitted enforcement (SC-009). Test-first.

title: US2 HTTP-level contract tests for mutation routes (move/archive/restore/delete/rename)
description: HANDOFF flagged T045 coverage is service-level; add HTTP contract tests for the US2 mutation routes in internal/tenancy to pin the wire contract (status codes, bodies, error shapes). Out of the UI scope; backend follow-up.
close_reason: Added internal/tenancy/hierarchy_contract_test.go — HTTP-level contract for create-sub/rename/move/archive/restore/delete + error shapes (400/404/409/401). 16 subtests pass; full tenancy integration suite + lint green.

title: SPA design pass: cohesive design system over the dashboard/auth pages
description: Apply a polished, cohesive design system (spacing scale, typography, tree affordances, buttons, states) to the existing dark theme without regressing behavior. Verify in a real browser.
close_reason: Cohesive design system applied (tokens, tree affordances, focus states, chrome); behavior unchanged, all tests + build green, verified live

title: US1/US2 UI polish: refresh-token auto-renew interceptor + empty/error states
description: Add silent access-token refresh on 401 in the HTTP interceptor (single-flight, retry once, logout on refresh failure) and nicer empty/error states across pages. Test-first: vitest for the refresh interceptor; Playwright for session-survives-expiry.
close_reason: Refresh-token auto-renew interceptor (single-flight) + recoverable load error; unit + e2e + build green

title: Plan: agent principal containment + autonomy gate
description: Single home business, no cross-subtree inheritance, no admin permissions; server-side Mode-1 autonomy gate after RBAC. Principle IV, FR-027, SC-011. See plan-inputs.md.

title: Plan: concurrency for hierarchy mutations
description: Serialize overlapping move/archive/restore/delete (FOR UPDATE / advisory locks on tenant_root_id); deterministic 409 conflict; no orphaning; acyclic invariant. FR-031. See plan-inputs.md.

title: Plan: lifecycle/GDPR + abuse limits
description: Soft-delete + retention/purge; GDPR erasure with pseudonymized append-only audit; cursor pagination + max page size; rate-limit buckets; email bounce suppression. FR-028/029. See plan-inputs.md.

title: Plan: auth & sessions + oracle hardening
description: Token TTLs, refresh rotation/reuse response, session/logout revocation, argon2id/magic-link hashing, email-change re-verify, recovery; fixed-cost sign-in/up + rate limits. FR-001/026/029, SC-010. See plan-inputs.md.

title: Plan: permission-resolution algorithm
description: Effective permissions = union of direct+inherited grants; archived-ancestor handling; no-grant-above-own-level (FR-023); scale within SC-007. FR-010/019/021. See plan-inputs.md.

title: Plan: RLS operational contract
description: SET LOCAL principal/subtree context, FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY, non-bypass app role, pool hygiene, fail-closed tests; app-predicate AND RLS independently deny. Principle I, FR-011/012. See plan-inputs.md.

title: Plan: hierarchy storage + tenant_root_id
description: Closure table (ancestor_id,descendant_id,depth,tenant_root_id) + parent_id; transactional move/closure rewrite; in-tx cycle check; cross-root move rejection. FR-004/005/006/012, SC-007. See plan-inputs.md.

title: Tenant Foundation (spec 001)
description: First feature for ManyForge: accounts, master->sub-business hierarchy, capability-catalog RBAC, AI-agent principals, tenant isolation, audit trail. Spec: specs/001-tenant-foundation/spec.md (31 FRs, 11 SCs). Plan-level decisions to resolve in /speckit-plan: specs/001-tenant-foundation/plan-inputs.md.

value: manyforge 001-tenant-foundation: backend + US1/US2 SPA + US3 done except escalation regression suite. Branch 001-tenant-foundation, NO git remote. US3 DONE: GET /permissions (T057), role CRUD /businesses/{id}/roles (T058/T059), invitations+accept (T060-T062,T053/T054), change-member-role T063 (manyforge-iwf, CLOSED). T063: PATCH /businesses/{id}/members/{principalId} -> internal/tenancy/members.go ChangeMemberRole; members.manage gate; escalation guard guardEscalation (FR-023: locked Owner role assignable only by HasOwnerRole, else subset-check actor Resolve ⊇ GetRolePermissions); last-Owner guardLastOwner (FR-014/024: only at tenant root, count via CountDirectOwners, AcquireTenantLock + deferred tenant_owner_guard backstop); audited membership.role_changed (from_role/to_role in NewValue); no-oracle (404 unknown biz/member/no-perm, 409 unknown role/escalation/last-owner). New sqlc queries in db/query/tenancy.sql: GetMembershipAt, UpdateMembershipRole(:exec), CountDirectOwners, GetRoleInTenant. Tests internal/tenancy/members_test.go (6 subtests, build:integration). Key facts: membership_rls keys on authorized_businesses(downward closure) so admin CAN read/update subordinate member rows; owner preset has ALL role_permission rows (cross join) but resolver still treats locked role as AllPermissionKeys; admin preset LACKS business.delete+ownership.transfer; tenant_owner_guard is DEFERRABLE constraint trigger (atomic last-owner backstop). US3 REMAINING: escalation regression suite T055/T056 (bd manyforge-9au) assign/edit/accept in internal/security_regression/escalation_test.go; manyforge-o0c effectively shipped (consider closing). Gotchas: colima, zsh noclobber(>|), sqlc v1.27 make generate, testdb re-applies all migrations. Run/handoff in specs/001-tenant-foundation/HANDOFF.md.
